genre_refs: Tinder (dating app); 'It's a Match' / swipe-right meme
description: White House meme styled as a Tinder dating-app interaction, set on a bright red and pink background. At the top, large bold white capital text reads 'ICE SWIPED RIGHT' followed by a white heart emoji. Two tilted smartphone mockups are composited in the center. The left phone shows a Tinder profile card with the Tinder flame logo and a 09:30 status bar: a photo of an Asian woman wearing glasses, with a red tag captioned 'Recently Arrested', the name 'Jiejun Shen' and 'China' beside a Chinese-flag emoji, and a subtitle reading 'Extortion - Intent to Extort Marriage'; the standard Tinder action buttons (rewind, X, star, green heart, lightning) appear below. The right phone shows a Tinder 'IT'S A MATCH!' screen, with the same woman's photo at the bottom and, at the top, a photo of an officer seen from behind wearing a tactical vest marked 'ICE'; a 'Send a message / something nice' input bar and reaction emojis appear at the bottom. The White House wordmark and emblem are centered at the bottom. The tweet text reads: 'ICE SAID NAH AND SWIPED RIGHT... No dress. No vows. No citizenship. JUST DEPORTED. IT'S A MATCH'.
notable_text: ICE SWIPED RIGHT; Recently Arrested; Jiejun Shen China; Extortion - Intent to Extort Marriage; IT'S A MATCH!; ICE; The WHITE HOUSE
